name: create-block/philosophy-section
title: Philosophy Section
description: A dynamic philosophy section with stats and rich text editing.

philosophyText1.default: We believe the most powerful design work exists at the intersection of culture, technology, and human behaviour. Every pixel, every interaction, every word carries intent.

philosophyText2.default: We work with a select number of clients each year — not because we can't scale, but because depth requires focus. The brands we shape with you should outlast trends and define categories.
